name: Win32 App Migration Tool
description: Win32 App Migration Tool inventories ConfigMgr applications and deployment types, builds .intunewin files, and creates Win32 apps in Intune. It automates exporting application details, deployment type data, and icons, prepares the Intune JSON payloads, and handles content upload to Intune. The tool supports end-to-end migration from ConfigMgr to Intune (Preview status) with configurable prerequisites and detailed logging.
author: Ben Whitmore

securityCheck.aiSummary: No evidence of remote code execution, credential theft, data exfiltration, or hardcoded secrets. The scripts appear to be legitimate Windows ConfigMgr/Intune admin tooling. However, there are code quality and correctness issues (invalid SiteCode regex; stray debug line; logging variable name mismatch) that should be fixed to avoid runtime errors and to maintain clean, accurate logs. Ensure trusted module loading paths and review for interactive prompts in automated contexts.
